error_signature: workspace collection data isn’t automatically fetched
title: Workspace data not updating on user login change
symptom: The list inside the Sidemenu does not display any items until a new item is added after changing logins.
applies_when: Navigating to the page with the Sidemenu
not_this_if: Workspace data is fetched correctly without adding a new item
root_cause: When a user changes their login, the application does not automatically refresh the workspace collection data associated with the new user. This leads to stale data being displayed until a new item is added, which triggers a refresh.
fix_steps: Implement a page workflow that fetches the workspace collection on page load
Ensure the fetch operation is triggered whenever the user logs in or changes
agent_instruction: Set up a page load workflow to fetch the workspace collection data upon user login change.
